stemHtml:
(For this question use annex 033-053 rev. 05.11.2004).
For a long distance flight at FL 390, "Long Range" regime, divided into four flight legs with the following characteristics:

segment AB – Ground distance: 2000 NM, head wind component: 50 kt
segment BC – Ground distance: 1000 NM, head wind component: 30 kt
segment CD – Ground distance: 500 NM, tail wind component: 100 kt
segment DE – Ground distance: 1000 NM, head wind component: 70 kt

The air distance of the entire flight is approximately…
